name: calendar-event-bot
description: Your personal productivity assistant that manages calendar events and project tasks. Sends reminders, handles updates, and responds to your productivity commands via direct messages.
features: Automatic event reminders (15 minutes and 1 hour before)
Manage calendar events (reschedule, update location, cancel)
View and manage your projects and tasks
View project members and task assignments
setup_instructions: Once activated, the Productivity Assistant will be available in your Direct Messages. Chat with it naturally to manage your calendar events, projects, and tasks.
